pages.title: Nebula Lens
pages.text: A remnant of distortion, anti-magic, and retaliatory repositioning. The Lens is at its best when being attacked is merely the first mistake your enemy makes.

pages.title: Dormant and Latent
pages.text: $(l)Dormant$(): Greatly reduces incoming magic damage and prevents ender pearl self-damage, but water remains unstable for the bearer.$(br2)$(l)Latent$(): The Lens becomes even harsher against sorcery and begins occasionally warping space to evade physical attacks entirely. Rain and immersion can also force short unstable jumps.

pages.title: Awakened, Ascended, Transcendent, Apex
pages.text: $(l)Awakened$(): The Lens fully unlocks $(thing)Reactive Blink$(), turning avoided hits into empowered retaliation.$(br2)$(l)Ascended$(): Post-blink retaliation becomes crueler, and unstable water reactions stop harming the bearer.$(br2)$(l)Transcendent$(): Successful blinks become more frequent and can briefly sharpen the bearer's movement.$(br2)$(l)Apex$(): The Lens reaches its most decisive state, with near-absolute anti-magic pressure and the strongest teleport-based counterattacks.
